title: cnidoscolus bahianus
intro: Cnidoscolus bahianus, also known as "candia" or "manzanilla de la sierra", is a species of plant in the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly referred to as the spurge family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Cnidoscolus bahianus include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support immune function and protect against oxidative stress. Cnidoscolus bahianus can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
